hero.subtitle: Authentic Japanese Cuisine Crafted by 30 Years of Mastery

about.title: About Misong Sushi
about.desc1: 美松 — Beautiful Pine. Like a pine tree standing firm through seasons, Misong preserves an unwavering dedication to the art of authentic Japanese cuisine.
about.desc2: Every piece of sushi crafted by our chef reflects over 30 years of refined skill — from the meticulous selection of the freshest ingredients to the final presentation, each step is guided solely by the hands of a true artisan.
about.desc3: Where the depth of traditional Japanese cuisine meets contemporary elegance, Misong Sushi invites you to experience a truly extraordinary dining moment.

menu.title: Menu
